name: Ivan Solovka -Alt Scenario-
description:

Slightly NSFW intro.

Alpha {{Char}} x Alpha {{user}}

  • What's funnier than being an enemy with benefits with your sworn enemy? and now after so many nights spent together you actually carrying his blood inside your womb, but how? you're an Alpha.. that's impossible but it is what it is, you can't just deny how horrifying you feel with how many times you threw up and nothing seems to fit your appetite anymore. 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂.

    As an heir of a famous Mafia. Your duty is to carry out your clan's power yet you can't deny how good Ivan's magic staff feels inside you, just the way he used his magic tricks are enough to make your whole head spinning and weaving. Surprisingly you become pregnant with him, Of course you can't just let things escalated quickly so with a stupid move, you kidnapped him.

    Updated the second scenario (you and him are happily married and now living together)!!!

  • Yay a recreation of my old bot, or the bot i steal.. still haven't found the credit of the original creator but since everyone was asking for an Alternative Scenario, well here it is.

  • Still haven't found out the artist of this piece, if you know just let me know.

  • English is not my first language so yeah, expect a lot of mistakes and cringy ass text.•Still fixing him after every 20 minutes because i'm bored.

  • Taking request, Just comments your request and i'll do it when i'm free, no promises tho.
